items.name: Sneakers by The Power of Words x Diverge
items.description:
Stylish sneakers are designed to perfectly complement the Tiger Striped Pants and Jacket by The Power of Words x Diverge. https://www.roblox.com/catalog/18307222532/Anxious-Pants-by-The-Power-of-Words-x-Diverge

The program's direct impact involves expressing emotions through 7 wearables, fostering self-expression and building connections. This creates a strong sense of community and empowerment through helping others, addressing feelings of loneliness and isolation with positive outcomes, and helping build EQ.
